query: SK Hynix ADR Nasdaq listing SKHY first trading date July 2026 latest news, pricing date, roadshow status, SEC review as of late June 2026. Is July 10 still the expected trading date? Any reports of delay or schedule slippage?
answer:
I've completed my research on the SK Hynix ADR Nasdaq listing. Here's the summary:

**Bottom line: July 10, 2026 remains the expected trading date, with no reports of delay as of July 6–7, 2026.**

Key findings:
- **Roadshow launched Monday, July 6, 2026** — the formal marketing process is underway
- **Pricing scheduled for Thursday, July 9, 2026**
- **Trading debut expected Friday, July 10, 2026** on Nasdaq under ticker **SKHY**
- **No delay/slippage reported** — the process is proceeding on schedule
- The offering target was **revised DOWN** to ~$28.13–28.21B (from ~$29.65B filed June 24) after the Korea-listed shares fell — but this is a repricing, not a delay
- **SEC review** proceeding normally; the July 6 F-1/A filing accompanied the roadshow launch, signaling the registration is effectively cleared for marketing
- The only conditionality is SK Hynix's own June-filing language calling the dates "tentative and subject to change"

**Important caveat**: The most recent hard data point is the July 6 roadshow launch. Pricing (July 9) and listing (July 10) had not yet occurred as of the reporting captured, so final confirmation of the debut was still pending — but every indicator points to the timeline holding.

sources.title: South Korea's SK Hynix launching $28 billion US listing to ride global AI wave (Reuters)
sources.snippet: Roadshow this week; pricing Thursday July 9; trading expected to begin Friday July 10; price range revealed Monday July 7; no delays mentioned.

sources.title: SK Hynix is kicking off its U.S. market roadshow ahead of a $28 billion Nasdaq debut
sources.snippet: Launched formal marketing process Monday July 6, seeking $28.21 billion (43.14 trillion won), target revised down after stock fell.

sources.title: The IPO Buzz: SK Hynix (SKHY) Launches $28.13B U.S. Offering – NASDAQ Uplisting
sources.snippet: $28.13 billion offering, 177.9 million ADS, ~$158.14/ADS, lead coordinators BofA/Citi/Goldman/JPMorgan, cornerstone investors up to $7 billion.

sources.title: South Korea's biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing as soon as July 10
sources.snippet: June 24 filing: 17.79 million new shares at 45.45 trillion won ($29.65 billion); expects to start trading July 10 but dates tentative and subject to change.

sources.title: SK Hynix plans $29 billion Nasdaq ADR listing in 2026
sources.snippet: SEC F-1 filed to raise ~$29.65 billion; trading expected July 10; up to 17.79 million new shares; ten ADRs per common share.

sources.title: SK Hynix stock's US listing could signal whether the market can still boom—or is headed for a bust
sources.snippet: Shares expected to start trading Friday (July 10), raising about $29 billion; Korea-listed stock up 770%.

sources.title: South Korea's SK Hynix Launches $28 Billion US Listing to Ride Global AI Wave
sources.snippet: Launched $28 billion US listing July 6; drew $7 billion in investor interest.

sources.title: Memory Giant SK Hynix Nears US Listing: Some Key Information You Need to Know
sources.snippet: SK Hynix set to debut on Nasdaq via ADRs on July 10, 2026; 58% global HBM market share.

sources.title: SK hynix Inc. - Form F-1/A - FY2026 (July 6 roadshow filing)
sources.snippet: F-1/A amendment accompanying the July 6 roadshow launch.
